metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.

The metal kettle rested above the blue flame. The metal kettle grew hot across the rounded base. The metal kettle released steam through the narrow spout. The metal kettle whistled across the quiet kitchen.

The sunflower seed absorbed water from the damp soil. The sunflower seed split along the softened shell. The sunflower seed pushed a white root downward. The sunflower seed raised a green shoot aboveground.
The paper boat entered the narrow stream. The paper boat spun around a smooth rock. The paper boat struck a low branch. The paper boat sank out of sight.

The packed snowball rolled down the steep hill. The packed snowball gathered loose snow during the descent. The packed snowball struck the wooden fence. The packed snowball burst into scattered white chunks.
The alarm clock rang beside the bed. The alarm clock vibrated across the wooden table. The alarm clock reached the edge of the wooden table. The alarm clock crashed onto the soft rug.
The red balloon escaped from the loose knot. The red balloon rose above the garden wall. The red balloon struck a thorny branch. The red balloon burst into thin rubber scraps.
The wax candle caught a spark from the match. The wax candle burned with a steady yellow flame. The wax candle melted down the brass holder. The wax candle left a hardened pool on the table.
The old truck started with a rough growl. The old truck pulled away from the empty curb. The old truck climbed the muddy hill. The old truck stopped beside the closed barn.
The bread dough expanded inside the warm oven. The bread dough formed a firm golden crust. The bread dough filled the kitchen with a rich smell. The bread dough cooled on the metal rack.
The clear raindrop landed on the window. The clear raindrop slid down the window. The clear raindrop joined a puddle on the sill. The clear raindrop flowed through the narrow drain.
The first domino tipped toward the neighboring tile. The first domino struck the neighboring tile. The first domino slid across the polished table. The first domino dropped onto the carpet.
The ceramic mug rolled from the crowded counter. The ceramic mug fell toward the stone floor. The ceramic mug struck the stone floor. The ceramic mug shattered into several sharp pieces.
The bright kite caught a strong gust. The bright kite climbed above the tall trees. The bright kite pulled hard against the string. The bright kite snapped the string.
The river ice warmed beneath the spring sunlight. The river ice cracked across the gray surface. The river ice broke into broad floating slabs. The river ice drifted toward the distant bridge.
The popcorn kernel heated inside the covered pan. The popcorn kernel swelled beneath the hard shell. The popcorn kernel burst with a soft pop. The popcorn kernel landed as a white puff.
The soap bubble floated across the garden. The soap bubble touched a pointed rose thorn. The soap bubble burst above the flowerbed. The soap bubble left tiny drops on the petals.
The ripe apple loosened from the thin branch. The ripe apple fell through the cool air. The ripe apple struck the grassy ground. The ripe apple rolled beside the garden path.
The bicycle chain slipped from the rear gear. The bicycle chain caught between adjacent metal teeth. The bicycle chain stopped the turning wheel. The bicycle chain bent a narrow link.
The wooden match scraped across the rough strip. The wooden match produced a bright spark. The wooden match ignited along the dark tip. The wooden match burned toward the holder's fingers.
The passenger train left the crowded station. The passenger train entered a long dark tunnel. The passenger train crossed a high steel bridge. The passenger train stopped beside the final platform.
The small elevator closed the silver doors. The small elevator rose through the central shaft. The small elevator slowed near the upper floor. The small elevator opened the silver doors.
The brown package left the busy warehouse. The brown package traveled inside a delivery van. The brown package reached the shaded front porch. The brown package rested beside the welcome mat.

The sealed letter dropped into the corner mailbox. The sealed letter traveled inside a canvas sack. The sealed letter passed through the sorting center. The sealed letter arrived at the mountain cabin.
The yellow leaf detached from the swaying branch. The yellow leaf spun through the cold air. The yellow leaf landed beside the street drain. The yellow leaf blocked the street drain.
The blue toy car rolled down the wooden ramp. The blue toy car gained speed during the descent. The blue toy car struck a square block. The blue toy car flipped onto the roof.
The glass marble escaped from the open jar. The glass marble rolled across the kitchen floor. The glass marble struck the painted wall. The glass marble stopped beneath the wooden chair.
The ice cube entered the warm lemonade. The ice cube cooled the warm lemonade. The ice cube shrank steadily. The ice cube disappeared completely.
The shallow puddle formed beneath the leaking pipe. The shallow puddle spread across the uneven pavement. The shallow puddle reached the warm sunlight. The shallow puddle dried into a dusty outline.
The storm cloud gathered above the open fields. The storm cloud darkened across the broad sky. The storm cloud released heavy rain below. The storm cloud drifted beyond the distant hills.
The campfire caught flame among the dry twigs. The campfire grew around the stacked logs. The campfire consumed the stacked logs. The campfire faded into glowing red embers.
The fountain pen leaked inside the cotton pocket. The fountain pen stained the cotton pocket. The fountain pen dried beneath the pocket seam. The fountain pen left a dark blue mark.
The red paint drop fell onto the blank canvas. The red paint drop spread across the blank canvas. The red paint drop blended with the yellow pigment. The red paint drop dried into an orange patch.
The metal zipper caught the coat lining. The metal zipper resisted a forceful pull. The metal zipper broke a small tooth. The metal zipper separated along the lower track.
The heavy door swung toward the plaster wall. The heavy door struck the plaster wall with force. The heavy door loosened the upper hinge. The heavy door hung at a crooked angle.
The soccer ball left Lena's kicking foot. The soccer ball rolled across the wet grass. The soccer ball struck the goalpost. The soccer ball bounced into the empty net.
The thick book slid from the tilted shelf. The thick book hit the wooden floor. The thick book opened near the middle. The thick book revealed a folded paper map.
The silver coin slipped from the torn pocket. The silver coin bounced across the tiled floor. The silver coin rolled beneath the cabinet. The silver coin vanished into the dusty darkness.
The metal spoon fell from the table edge. The metal spoon struck the soup bowl. The metal spoon splashed broth across the cloth. The metal spoon landed on the kitchen floor.
The oak branch bent beneath the heavy snow. The oak branch cracked near the trunk. The oak branch broke from the trunk. The oak branch fell across the narrow path.

The climbing rope tightened under the climber's weight. The climbing rope rubbed against a sharp rock edge. The climbing rope frayed across several fibers. The climbing rope snapped above the empty ledge.

The flashlight battery powered the bright bulb. The flashlight battery weakened during the long walk. The flashlight battery dimmed the narrow beam. The flashlight battery stopped supplying electrical current.

The black flashlight clicked on inside the cave. The black flashlight illuminated the rocky passage. The black flashlight flickered near the deep chamber. The black flashlight went dark without warning.

The office printer received a large document. The office printer pulled the blank sheet inward. The office printer covered the blank sheet with text. The office printer released the blank sheet into the tray.
The washing machine filled with cool water. The washing machine rotated the dirty clothes. The washing machine spun at high speed. The washing machine stopped with a soft chime.
The coffee maker heated the fresh water. The coffee maker pushed the fresh water through the grounds. The coffee maker filled the glass pot. The coffee maker beeped beside the waiting cups.

The refrigerator door swung open across the kitchen. The refrigerator door released cold air into the room. The refrigerator door moved back toward the frame. The refrigerator door sealed the chilled compartment.
The oven timer reached zero on the display. The oven timer rang across the kitchen. The oven timer flashed a red light. The oven timer fell silent beside the stove.
The traffic light changed to bright green. The traffic light flashed green above the intersection. The traffic light changed to yellow. The traffic light changed to bright red.

The mechanical clock released stored spring tension. The mechanical clock turned several small brass gears. The mechanical clock advanced the black clock hands. The mechanical clock stopped with a quiet click.

The ink cartridge supplied black ink to the printer. The ink cartridge produced increasingly pale lines. The ink cartridge printed a nearly blank page. The ink cartridge triggered the replacement warning.
The kitchen faucet released a thin stream. The kitchen faucet sprayed faster into the deep sink. The kitchen faucet filled the deep sink. The kitchen faucet overflowed the deep sink onto the floor.
The drainpipe received rainwater from the roof. The drainpipe rattled under growing pressure. The drainpipe overflowed above the blocked bend. The drainpipe flooded the stone garden path.

The paper shredder grabbed the inserted page. The paper shredder pulled the inserted page past the blades. The paper shredder cut the inserted page into strips. The paper shredder stopped beneath the empty slot.
The vending machine accepted the silver coin. The vending machine illuminated the chosen button. The vending machine released a cold can. The vending machine returned several small coins.
The automatic gate detected movement near the driveway. The automatic gate opened across the driveway. The automatic gate held the driveway clear. The automatic gate closed across the driveway.
The digital camera focused on the distant bird. The digital camera opened the round shutter. The digital camera captured light through the lens. The digital camera stored the finished image.

The brass telescope turned toward the bright moon. The brass telescope gathered faint reflected light. The brass telescope enlarged the bright moon. The brass telescope revealed a wide crater on the bright moon.

The laboratory microscope received the prepared slide. The laboratory microscope magnified the prepared slide. The laboratory microscope projected a bright image. The laboratory microscope revealed several divided nuclei.
The research rocket ignited the main engines. The research rocket lifted above the launch tower. The research rocket crossed the highest clouds. The research rocket entered a stable orbit.
The paper airplane left Noah's raised hand. The paper airplane glided across the classroom. The paper airplane dipped near the window. The paper airplane landed beside the chalkboard.
The wooden rowboat left the sandy shore. The wooden rowboat crossed the quiet cove. The wooden rowboat struck the opposite beach. The wooden rowboat stopped with a shallow scrape.
The city bus closed the folding doors. The city bus pulled away from the curb. The city bus crossed the busy district. The city bus reached the central terminal.
The subway train entered the underground tunnel. The subway train passed several tiled stations. The subway train slowed near the terminal. The subway train stopped beside the crowded platform.
The island ferry left the concrete pier. The island ferry cut through the choppy waves. The island ferry approached the rocky island. The island ferry docked beside the harbor wall.
The red suitcase rolled across the terminal floor. The red suitcase entered the security scanner. The red suitcase emerged from the moving belt. The red suitcase reached the boarding gate.

The empty shopping cart rolled down the sloping lot. The empty shopping cart gained speed during the descent. The empty shopping cart hit the concrete curb. The empty shopping cart overturned beside the hedge.
The wooden crate slid across the truck bed. The wooden crate struck the open tailgate. The wooden crate fell onto the road. The wooden crate split along a corner seam.

The aluminum ladder leaned against the brick wall. The aluminum ladder shifted across the loose gravel. The aluminum ladder lost contact with the brick wall. The aluminum ladder crashed onto the driveway.
The thin curtain caught a warm breeze. The thin curtain billowed toward the table. The thin curtain brushed the burning candle. The thin curtain ignited along the lower edge.
The dry towel touched the spilled water. The dry towel absorbed the spilled water. The dry towel grew heavy from absorption. The dry towel left the floor nearly dry.
The yellow sponge entered the full bucket. The yellow sponge absorbed the cool water. The yellow sponge swelled between the metal sides. The yellow sponge dripped across the clean floor.
The clay pot entered the heated kiln. The clay pot hardened under the intense heat. The clay pot cooled beside the open window. The clay pot cracked along the rim.
The wet clay spun on the potter's wheel. The wet clay rose beneath the steady hands. The wet clay formed a shallow bowl. The wet clay dried beside the warm kiln.

The refrigerator magnet slid down the metal door. The refrigerator magnet lost contact near the handle. The refrigerator magnet fell toward the tile floor. The refrigerator magnet broke along the painted corner.
The rubber band stretched across a wooden frame. The rubber band tightened under growing tension. The rubber band snapped near a wooden peg. The rubber band struck the opposite wall.
The bent paper clip weakened along the central curve. The bent paper clip cracked under pressure. The bent paper clip snapped into small pieces. The bent paper clip fell onto the desk.

The loose shoelace slipped from the final knot. The loose shoelace dragged across the pavement. The loose shoelace caught beneath the moving shoe. The loose shoelace tightened painfully across the foot.

The leather hiking boot stepped into the muddy puddle. The leather hiking boot darkened around a leather seam. The leather hiking boot left dark prints across the stones. The leather hiking boot dried beside the fire.
The blue umbrella opened above the narrow sidewalk. The blue umbrella caught a sudden gust. The blue umbrella turned inside out. The blue umbrella lost a metal spoke.
The yellow raincoat repelled the falling rain. The yellow raincoat became wet along the hem. The yellow raincoat dripped onto the porch boards. The yellow raincoat dried beside the doorway.
The white snowflake formed inside the cold cloud. The white snowflake fell through the still air. The white snowflake landed on a wool sleeve. The white snowflake melted into a tiny drop.
The long icicle warmed beneath the sunlight. The long icicle loosened from the roof edge. The long icicle fell toward the walkway. The long icicle shattered across the walkway.
The glacier chunk broke away from the blue wall. The glacier chunk splashed into the dark bay. The glacier chunk floated across the dark bay. The glacier chunk melted beneath the mild air.
The ocean wave rose beyond the sandbar. The ocean wave curled above the shallow water. The ocean wave crashed across the beach. The ocean wave retreated toward the open sea.
The sandcastle stood near the incoming surf. The sandcastle met the breaking wave. The sandcastle collapsed into wet sand. The sandcastle washed away beneath the breaking wave.
The rocky tide pool filled with fresh seawater. The rocky tide pool trapped floating strands of seaweed. The rocky tide pool warmed beneath the bright sun. The rocky tide pool shrank into damp sand.
The sleeping volcano rumbled beneath the forest. The sleeping volcano cracked around the summit. The sleeping volcano expelled a thick ash cloud. The sleeping volcano quieted under the gray sky.
The valley geyser gathered pressure underground. The valley geyser erupted through the rocky opening. The valley geyser sprayed hot water overhead. The valley geyser quieted beside the rocky opening.
The dark thundercloud spread across the valley. The dark thundercloud flashed above the fields. The dark thundercloud released a heavy downpour. The dark thundercloud moved beyond the eastern ridge.
The bright lightning bolt split the stormy sky. The bright lightning bolt struck the dry tree. The bright lightning bolt ignited the dry tree. The bright lightning bolt vanished above the dry tree.
The grass fire started beside the dusty road. The grass fire spread across the dry field. The grass fire consumed an abandoned wooden shed. The grass fire faded near the wet ditch.
The candle flame touched the paper decoration. The candle flame ignited the paper decoration. The candle flame spread across the paper decoration. The candle flame consumed the paper decoration.
The cooking oil heated inside the iron pan. The cooking oil shimmered across the iron pan. The cooking oil released a thin smoke. The cooking oil ignited above the burner.
The pancake batter landed on the hot pan. The pancake batter spread into a broad circle. The pancake batter formed bubbles across the surface. The pancake batter firmed into a golden pancake.
The brown egg struck the rim of the mixing bowl. The brown egg split across the shell. The brown egg released the contents into the mixing bowl. The brown egg mixed with the flour.
The sugar cube dropped into the hot tea. The sugar cube absorbed the hot tea. The sugar cube softened within the hot tea. The sugar cube dissolved throughout the hot tea.
The tea bag entered the steaming cup. The tea bag released brown color into the water. The tea bag flavored the water with herbs. The tea bag sank inside the steaming cup.
The metal key entered the old lock. The metal key turned the inner cylinder. The metal key released the brass latch. The metal key opened the heavy door.
The smooth stone rolled from the riverbank. The smooth stone entered the still pond. The smooth stone sank below the surface. The smooth stone struck the muddy bottom.
